name: launch-sequence
description: Run the full pre-launch gauntlet (first-contact → support-storm → trust-audit → pre-mortem) and get a single GO/CAUTION/NO-GO verdict.

interface.shortDescription: Run the full pre-launch gauntlet (first-contact → support-storm → trust-audit → pre-mortem) and get a single GO/CAUTION/NO-GO verdict.
interface.longDescription: Run the full pre-launch gauntlet (first-contact → support-storm → trust-audit → pre-mortem) and get a single GO/CAUTION/NO-GO verdict. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Use the Launch Sequence skill for this task.
